form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months favourite; won by 2.75 len at Perak March 22 over 1200m defeating Stormrunner with 58kg at $1.80. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Seymour 3yo Mdn-Sw on May 27 over 1000m, 2 len behind Supervise with 58kg at $4.40. Great chance to make it two in a row. Improver with winning prospects.
